title.rendered: HBO’s I Love LA Features Our Swan Boats at Echo Park Lake!

content.rendered:
Something pretty cool just hit Hollywood, and it features some familiar faces (and feathers)! The new HBO comedy series I Love LA used our iconic Wheel Fun Rentals Swan Boats at Echo Park Lake for their official promo poster! That’s right, the same swan boats you pedal with your friends, family, or special someone are now starring front and center in HBO’s latest L.A.-based show.

About the Show

Created by and starring Rachel Sennott, I Love LA follows a close-knit group of friends navigating love, ambition, and life in Los Angeles. It’s witty, heartfelt, and full of that perfectly chaotic L.A. energy, so naturally, scenes at Echo Park just made sense! The show premieres November 2, 2025 on HBO, and the poster shows off our swan boats in all their sunny, laid-back glory.

Why the Swan Boats?

Our swan boats at Echo Park Lake have become a true L.A. icon — part chill afternoon escape, part local landmark. They’re fun, photogenic, and give off those “only in L.A.” vibes that perfectly fit the spirit of I Love LA. So when HBO’s team wanted a shot that captured the real Los Angeles, not just the skyline or the palm trees, they came right to the lake. And honestly, we can’t blame them.

Visit the Real Thing

Want to experience the same swan boats featured in the I Love LA poster? You can! Wheel Fun Rentals’ swan boats are available at several locations in the greater LA area including Echo Park Lake, Lake Balboa in Van Nuys, and Rainbow Lagoon in Long Beach! Hours vary by location and reservations are required at Echo Park and Rainbow Lagoon, click below to book your LA Swan Boat ride today!

We’re thrilled to see our swan boats share the spotlight with HBO’s newest comedy. Be sure to catch I Love LA when it premieres and then come take your own photo-worthy ride!

 

Book Your Echo Park LA Swan Boat Experience!

 

Book Your Rainbow Lagoon LA Swan Boat Experience!
